sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ لَيْلَى تَشْعُرُ بِالتَّوَتُّرِ قَبْلَ الِامْتِحَانِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla se osjećala nervozno prije ispita.
sentences.translationEn: Layla used to feel nervous before the exam.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ قَلْبُهَا يَخْفِقُ بِسُرْعَةٍ وَيَدَاهَا تَرْتَجِفَانِ.
sentences.translation: Srce joj je brzo kucalo a ruke su joj se tresle.
sentences.translationEn: Her heart was beating fast and her hands were trembling.

sentences.arabic: أَخَذَتْ نَفَسًا عَمِيقًا وَقَالَتْ لِنَفْسِهَا «أَنَا قَادِرَةٌ».
sentences.translation: Uzela je duboki dah i rekla sebi "ja mogu".
sentences.translationEn: She took a deep breath and told herself "I can do it".

sentences.translation: Položila je ispit i osjetila olakšanje.
sentences.translationEn: She passed the exam and felt relief.
